label: Skill
description: Defines a pawn skill tracked by the game, including its display label, grammar rules, work tag interactions, and lesson interaction.

skillLabel.label: Skill label
skillLabel.description: Displayed name of the skill. Copied to the inherited label field when label is absent.

generalRules.label: General rules
generalRules.description: Grammar rule pack used to generate skill-related text such as backstory entries and thought descriptions.

usuallyDefinedInBackstories.label: Usually defined in backstories
usuallyDefinedInBackstories.description: If true, random backstories are expected to define this skill rather than leaving it at its default value.

pawnCreatorSummaryVisible.label: Pawn creator summary visible
pawnCreatorSummaryVisible.description: If true, this skill is shown in the pawn creator summary panel during colony setup.

disablingWorkTags.label: Disabling work tags
disablingWorkTags.description: WorkTags flags that, when present on a pawn, disable this skill regardless of work type assignments. Comma-separated list of flag names.

listOrder.label: List order
listOrder.description: Relative ordering of this skill in UI lists. Lower values appear earlier.

neverDisabledBasedOnWorkTypes.label: Never disabled based on work types
neverDisabledBasedOnWorkTypes.description: If true, this skill is never considered disabled due to disabled work types; only disablingWorkTags can disable it.

lessonInteraction.label: Lesson interaction
lessonInteraction.description: InteractionDef used for teaching lessons in this skill. Defaults to LessonGeneric when omitted.

basic-skill.label: Basic skill
basic-skill.description: General-purpose pawn skill visible in the pawn creator.

combat-skill.label: Combat skill
combat-skill.description: Skill associated with violent work that is never disabled by work type restrictions.
